_meta.author: Edil-ozi
_meta.title: Horizontal Scroll Carousel
_meta.description: The HorizontalScrollCarousel component is a visually engaging carousel that leverages vertical scrolling to create a horizontal sliding effect for images. As users scroll down the page, the images move horizontally across the screen, providing a dynamic and interactive experience. This component is ideal for showcasing a series of images in a unique and captivating manner. It utilizes framer-motion for smooth animations and next/image for optimized image loading. The carousel is fully customizable, allowing you to adjust the number of images and the scrolling behavior to fit your design needs.
